A '''flat-bodied creature''' was native to the swamps of [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. Its body had a brown and yellow coloration, and it had four eyes.<ref name="Wildlife">''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]''</ref> 

== Behind the scenes ==
The creature appeared in [[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide|''The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide'']]'','' written by [[Terryl Whitlatch]] and [[Bob Carrau]] and illustrated by Terryl Whitlatch, at the beginning of the Dagobah section of the book. It isn't named, nor is there an entry about it in the book itself.<ref name="Wildlife" />

{{Creature-stub}}
